mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inv_stock WHERE warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND IFNULL(#{locationId}, 0) = IFNULL(location_id, 0) AND product_id = #{productId} AND IFNULL(#{batchNo}, '') = IFNULL(batch_no, '') AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inv_stock (warehouse_id, warehouse_name, location_id, location_name, product_id, product_code, product_name, spec, unit_id, unit_name, batch_no, qty, available_qty, avg_cost, total_cost, last_in_date, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{warehouseId}, #{warehouseName}, IFNULL(#{locationId},0), IFNULL(#{locationName},''), #{productId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, IFNULL(#{spec},''), IFNULL(#{unitId},0), IFNULL(#{unitName},''), IFNULL(#{batchNo},''), #{qty}, #{qty}, #{amount}/#{qty}, #{amount}, #{bizDate}, NOW(), NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE qty = qty + VALUES(qty), available_qty = available_qty + VALUES(qty), total_cost = total_cost + VALUES(total_cost), avg_cost = (qty + VALUES(qty)) > 0 ? (total_cost + VALUES(total_cost)) / (qty + VALUES(qty)) : avg_cost, last_in_date = VALUES(last_in_date), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE inv_stock SET qty = #{qty}, available_qty = #{qty}, avg_cost = #{avgCost}, total_cost = #{totalCost}, last_out_date = #{bizDate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
